arts.ttl: Five records Mohamed Salah could break this season
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has enjoyed a record-breaking start to the season at Liverpool. Salah scored and assisted two goals in Liverpool’s win at West Ham last time out to set yet more milestones. He became the first player to have both scored and assisted in eight different Premier League games in a single campaign. The Egyptian […] The post Five records Mohamed Salah could break this season first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Manchester United game subject to safety decision after heavy snow
arts.sum: Amber alert in Liverpool and Manchester for Sunday Weather hits more of Sunday’s programme in England Liverpool say “every effort” is being made for their home game with Manchester United to take place on Sunday amid adverse weather conditions on Merseyside, with a decision expected just after midday. Snow fell across Merseyside and the north west overnight and Liverpool City Council’s Safety Advisory Group met on Sunday morning to determine whether the Premier League match could go ahead due to access issues. The group will reconvene at 12pm GMT in the hope that weather conditions will ease and the fixture – one of the biggest in English football – will kick off as scheduled at 4.30pm. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Will the Liverpool vs Manchester United Premier League game be played today?
arts.sum: In a statement issued earlier today, the Merseyside club said: “ A safety meeting was held this morning to assess the weather and travel conditions for today’s fixture against Manchester United at Anfield. It remains unclear whether today’s Premier League clash between arch rivals Liverpool and Manchester United will go ahead, amid adverse weather conditions .

arts.ttl: Man Utd push Trent Alexander-Arnold to REJECT Real Madrid
arts.sum: It is widely expected that Alexander-Arnold will join Madrid on a Bosman Transfer at the end of the season when his Liverpool contract expires. Real Madrid have reportedly offered Trent Alexander-Arnold a contract worth a staggering €90 million.
